message:
style(tests): apply rustfmt formatting across 22 test suites

Bulk rustfmt pass over the integration/e2e test suite. The primary
changes are:

- Expand single-line trait method implementations into multi-line form
  (e.g. fn name(&self) -> &str { "x" } becomes a proper block), which
  is the canonical rustfmt style for impl blocks
- Reformat function arguments that exceeded line width limits, moving
  struct literal arguments into properly indented blocks
- Normalize assert_eq! macro formatting with multi-line expected values
- Reformat closure arguments and stream combinator chains for readability
- Fix a few minor whitespace-only inconsistencies in function signatures

No logic changes — purely mechanical formatting. Affected test files:
branch_edge_failure_coverage, ci_artifact_retention, ci_full_suite_gate,
ci_strict_gates_validation, config_edge_cases,
e2e_artifact_retention_triage, e2e_failure_injection_recovery,
e2e_golden_transcript_diff, e2e_high_risk_workflows,
e2e_interruption_resume_replay, e2e_provider_failure_injection,
e2e_replay_bundle_validation, e2e_replay_bundles, e2e_soak_stability,
extensions_auth_error_coverage, provider_native_contract,
provider_session_coverage, qa_certification_dossier,
qa_docs_policy_validation, resource_edge_cases, rpc_edge_cases,
vcr_parity_validation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
